title: PR #128: Reduce checkout worker concurrency
summary: PR #128 merged: "Reduce checkout worker concurrency" after checkout latency increased during inventory sync.
body:
Repository: demo/checkout
Author: ada
Labels: service:checkout-api, inventory, latency
Changed files: services/checkout-api/config/workers.toml, services/inventory-sync/src/worker.rs
Linked issue: #120
Outcome note: the team reduced inventory worker concurrency and watched checkout p99 latency recover.
author: ada
